CM6.name: Chord Melody — 6 string
CM6.description: Chord melody / fingerstyle voicings on standard 6-string guitar. Melody note on top (strings 1-2).

CM7.name: Chord Melody — 7 string
CM7.description: Chord melody voicings on 7-string guitar (Van Eps tuning, low A). Fuller bass support with melody on top.

CV6.name: Comping/Vocal — 6 string
CV6.description: Comping and accompaniment voicings on standard 6-string. Melody carried by voice or another instrument.

CV7.name: Comping/Vocal — 7 string
CV7.description: Comping voicings on 7-string guitar (Van Eps tuning, low A). Extended bass range for harmonic support.
